# GitHub Repository Metadata

Use these settings when creating or updating the GitHub repository.

## Repository Name

Awesome-Operations-Research

## Short Description

A curated list of awesome Operations Research frameworks, solvers, libraries, software, books, courses, papers, datasets, conferences, and learning resources.

## Topics

- operations-research
- optimization
- linear-programming
- integer-programming
- simulation
- analytics
- decision-science
- supply-chain
- operations-management
- awesome-list

## Website

Leave blank unless GitHub Pages or a companion website is created.

## Canonical URLs

The repository is published at
`https://github.com/SirMore/Awesome-Operations-Research`. This URL is already set in
`CITATION.cff` (`url` and `repository-code`) and `CHANGELOG.md` (the `[1.0.0]`
release-tag link). Update these if the repository is ever moved or renamed.
